case_title: SPEEDY GONZALEZ INSTANT PRINTING INC. et al VS MINUTE MEN PRESS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEEDY GONZALEZ INSTANT PRINTING INC. GUZMAN, ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINUTE MEN PRESS, INC. MCCLENTON, EDWIN $1,379.85 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENTON, EDWIN HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: DEC-14-1993 AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENTON, EDWIN
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF FEB-02-1994, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENTON, EDWIN
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-12-1994, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM JAN-12-1994 TO FEB-02-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06 AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLENTON, EDWIN
BENCH LETTER SET FOR 2/2/94 SENT OUT TO DEFT. ORDERED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY. BOTH PARTIES NOTIFIED.
CERT. RECEIPT TO MINUTE MEN PRESS GROUP RETURNED SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,379.85 FILED BY SPEEDY GONZALEZ INSTANT PRINTING INC. GUZMAN, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT MINUTE MEN PRESS, INC. MCCLENTON, EDWIN HICKEY, DANIEL HICKEY, MAUREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PLT. LETTER REQUESTING TO WAIVE 4 MONTH PENALTY FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION FORWARDED TO DEPT. 6
